title: Fix blank page on new tab/window open

requirements.text: Fix the blank/empty page issue that occurs when the app is opened in a new tab or window. Audit `frontend/src/App.tsx` to ensure the session check on mount correctly reads `globalchat_session` from localStorage and transitions to either `LandingPage` or `ChatPage` without rendering a blank screen. The loading/spinner state must resolve correctly on initial render, and the app must never remain stuck in a blank state after the session check completes.

quotes: when i open it in a different page its showing nothing just blank empty space no nothing

acceptanceCriteria: Opening the app URL in a brand new browser tab renders either the LandingPage (if no active session) or the ChatPage (if a valid session exists) — never a blank white or black screen.
The loading spinner (if shown) always resolves within a short time and transitions to the correct page.
The session check in App.tsx reads `globalchat_session` from localStorage synchronously or with a brief async check, and sets the correct page state before the first meaningful render.
The fix works consistently across Chrome, Firefox, and mobile browsers when opening a new tab.

requirements.text: Audit `frontend/src/main.tsx` entry point and `frontend/index.html` to ensure the React app mounts correctly on all page loads. Verify that the root `<div id='root'>` is always present and that the React `createRoot` call in `main.tsx` never fails silently. Ensure no uncaught JavaScript errors during initialization prevent the app from rendering.

quotes: when i open it in a different page its showing nothing just blank empty space no nothing

acceptanceCriteria: No JavaScript errors appear in the browser console on initial page load in a new tab.
The React app mounts successfully and renders content without requiring a page refresh.
The `root` div in `index.html` is correctly targeted by the React entry point.

requirements.text: Ensure `frontend/src/lib/auth.ts` initializes synchronously without throwing errors that could block the app render. The `seedOwnerAccount` call (which seeds the `AI.Caffeine` account into `globalchat_users`) must not throw or cause unhandled exceptions if localStorage is unavailable or corrupted. Wrap any localStorage reads/writes in try-catch blocks to prevent initialization failures from crashing the app.

quotes: when i open it in a different page its showing nothing just blank empty space no nothing

acceptanceCriteria: The auth module loads without throwing exceptions even if localStorage contains malformed data.
Errors in `auth.ts` initialization do not prevent the React app from rendering.
The app renders correctly even if localStorage is empty (fresh browser profile or incognito mode).

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter the backend schema or Motoko actor.
Preserve all existing authenticated session logic — do not change how sessions are stored or validated.
nonGoals: Adding new features or commands to the admin panel.
Changing the visual design or theme.
